sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66434" key="meso/zeugma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσό-ζευγμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n66434.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a word which belongs equally to what precedes and to what follows</tr_>, Diom.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.444</biblScope> </bibl> K.; also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσό-ζευξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Sacerd.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.456</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
